entry.title: Re: Priority in MB26
entry.content:
I believe you need to run transaction COGI to clear the nil stock error after or before MB26 is run. Here is a description on what COGI does.

COGI is used to check and clear error records that occur during backflushing or automatic goods receipt in production orders. When automatic goods issue or receipt is used, failed goods movements will be captured in error records that can be viewed and reprocessed using COGI.

entry.title: Re: Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability) - CE2408
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

Great blog!

What is the status of booklet in Manage KPIs and Reports? The status of predefined booklet, "Cost Center Review Booklet(Booklet ID: SAP_FIN_CO_RB_COST_CENTER)" is "Application Outdated". Is this booklet no longer valid? Is it possible to copy it and create a custom booklet by customer? Technically, we can copy it and create a custom booklet but is it OK?

 

 

I would like to know the supportability of outdated booklet.

Best regards, Takuhito

entry.title: Value in "Is Contingent Worker of" for worker type BBP005 in Manage Workforce app
entry.content:
When trying to create USER ID in Manage Workforce app, what kind of value should be entered to the field "Is Contingent Worker of" if the worker type is BBP005.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Value in "Is Contingent Worker of" for worker type BB...
entry.content: In the field "Is Contingent Worker Of", enter Supplier of the Contingent Worker role (BBP005). For the tips regarding the fields, you may also check How to Fill In Downloaded Templates.

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Dang Hai NGUYEN, and I am currently working as a .NET Developer at Lotte Innovate Vietnam. I am writing to express my interest in obtaining a free voucher for the SAP Certified Associate - SAP Business One C_TB120 certification exam.

As a dedicated professional in the SAP ecosystem, I believe that obtaining this certification would significantly enhance my skills and contribute to changing my career - path from a developer to a consultant. However, due to financial constraints, I find the exam fee to be challenging. I have not received any free attempt voucher before.

I have thoroughly prepared for the C_TB120 exam and am eager to demonstrate my competence in SAP technologies. I kindly request your assistance in providing me with a free voucher for this certification.

I have completed the learning journey of Explore SAP Business One, Web Client.

I have already registered with my email: dangnh@lotte.vn

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response.

Thanks and Best regards,

LOTTE INNOVATE VIETNAM – HANOI BRANCH

NGUYEN HAI DANG
Developer | ERP TFT

Add: 31st floor, West Tower, Lotte Center Hanoi, 54 Lieu Giai, Cong Vi, Ba Dinh, Hanoi

Phone: (+84) 902159489   Email: dangnh@lotte.vn

entry.title: Is it possible that qRFC with destination NONE stuck in SMQ1?
entry.content: Hi all, The stuck queues I've seen are all in SMQ2, is it possible that stuck happened in SMQ1? If it is possible, could you please give an example？ Regards, Eric

entry.title: Re: How to prevent Excel from deleting leading zeros
entry.content:
Just use below code, it will export excel as char type and keep the leading zero 🙂

go_worksheet->set_cell( ip_column = p_col ip_row = p_row ip_value = p_value ip_style = font_content ip_abap_type = 'C' ) .

entry.title: Re: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Posi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Even though * is marked in the matrix relationship section, as long as the association is not required, there should not be any error when creating a new position with empty matrix relationship, did you encounter any error during creation?

Best regards,

Elsa

entry.title: Re: Insufficient privileges to perform this action. - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Thank you @PrashantJayaram .

This resolution helped me too.

entry.title: Re: Implement a More Efficient GIS-ERP Integration Following a Few Simple Steps
entry.content: See my other blogs here: https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/324787

entry.title: Re: How to make an infinity scrolling in macros table?
entry.content: We also use macros table for the list page which we put the macros table in <f:content> tag of <f:DynamicPage> and it can scrolling to load (I also try to put my dialog table in <f:DynamicPage> like that but still not have the endless scrolling). I using UI5 v1.126.2

entry.title: Re: How to fix OOMKilled restart issue with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Indeed the problem has been escalated to Product team and they're evaluating various solutions to fix the problem. Using malloc alternative is part of the discussion.

This being said changing malloc arena size seems easy to rollout globally with limited drawback.

entry.title: Re: Attach Iflow to one worker node
entry.content: The best way to avoid parallel processing is to use Exclusive queue / topic endpoint on the JMS broker (provider). With that set, you will have a guaranteed single processor with other nodes acting standby in a fault tolerant mode.

entry.title: Re: How to fix OOMKilled restart issue with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Yannick,

Glad to know that Product team is following up, thanks for the update.

In the mean time we will try to tune down the malloc arena first. Please update us again if SAP comes up with permanent fix.

Thanks,

Duc.

entry.title: Re: Balance Sheet/Income Statement Custom S4HC ?
entry.content:
Dear,

The standard Fiori app cannot be modified. You could explore the possibility of embedded analytics to meet the reporting requirements. Custom analytical query + Manage KPI and Reports approach, use I_GLAccountLineItemSemTag as datasouce.

Thank you for sharing!

entry.title: Cannot go back to a previous period in Close peridod app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I understand that in SAP Public Cloud, it is not possible to go back to a previous period in the Close Period app. Could you please confirm if this is correct?

If I still need to reopen the previous period, what steps should I take? Are there any workarounds or alternative solutions available?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP CPQ integration with Cloud Identity Service - Conflict on Documentation
entry.content:
Need clarification on the documentation found here:

Integrate SAP CPQ and Identity Provisioning Service (Example Scenario) | SAP Help Portal

In this help document it is mentioned that in Cloud Identity Service we create user Groups based on CPQ Permission groups.

 

In the SCIM API documentation for CPQ that can be found here:

SCIM API | SAP Help Portal

the Mapping of groups is based on CPQ User Types and not on permission groups and using the SCIM connector we get User type + a suffix of '-USERTYPE'.

 

Questions:

  1. If I am to setup a transformation where SAP CPQ as source, will I get groups created in Cloud Identity Service based on User Types or based on Permission Groups?
  2. Will I also also be getting the permission groups as groups in Cloud Identity Service?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ integration with Cloud Identity Service - Con...
entry.content:
Answers:

  1. When setting up a transformation with SAP CPQ as the source, groups in Cloud Identity Service will be created based on User Types and not directly on Permission Groups. This is because the SCIM connector maps users to groups using their User Type + "-USERTYPE" suffix​.

  2. Yes, permission groups will also appear as groups in Cloud Identity Service, but separately from the user-type-based groups. The documents mention that other groups (besides the "-USERTYPE" groups) are permission groups, and they are also referenced by their system IDs​.

So, Cloud Identity Service will contain both:

  • Groups based on User Types (with the "-USERTYPE" suffix).
  • Groups representing Permission Groups, which are mapped separately.

entry.title: How can I add eventDelegate to a DatePicker control inside a fragment in a Dialog?
entry.content:
I have a Datepicker with id="lowDatePicker" inside a fragment in a dialog
In the controller, I am setting:

public onInit(): void {
const dateLowControl = this.byId("lowDatePicker");
if (dateLowControl) {
dateLowControl.addEventDelegate({
onAfterRendering: function (oEvent) {
console.log($("#" + dateLowControl.getId() + "-inner"));
$("#" + oEvent.srcControl.getId() + "-inner").prop("readonly", true);
},
});
}

But I am not getting the datePicker element. How to correctly add the eventDelegate in this case?

entry.title: CI DS Task in INSERT_UPDATE doesn't update values
entry.content:
We run CI DS Task to load open sales order data from file to IBP. Data is at SKU/Ship-to/Tech week level. We are seeing the behavior that if sales order for a given SKU/Ship to combination moves from one tech week to another, data gets loaded correctly in IBP but old data doesn't get deleted. This causes mismatch in data volume in IBP. 

Based on SAP Help - it looks like this behavior may be correct. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/eab8fd1726934516a89eabced318b210/9cea9166178d49d2a05be529f377f959.html

Wanted to get feedback if anyone faced similar scenario before and running task using $G_BATCH_COMMAND 'REPLACE' is only alternative here? 

Thanks for inputs.

Thank you.

Thanks

Arpit

SAP GRC Firefighter for SAP NetWeaver

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content: Hi Jeery, Thanks for your update. My doubt, was when am doing custom logic tracing, I can see the badi that i have implemented in header lavel is getting trigger, but I dont see item lavel BADI in custom logic tracing.

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content: + I have implemented the below BADI 1)LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE 2)LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD 3)LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM The process am following while doing custom tracing are - 1) open display outbound delivery 2) giving outbound number -> execute 3) switching to display->change 4) menu->extra->output delivery ->output control -> adding my custom form 5) display Then when am checking in custom logic tracing, i Can see only "LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD" is triggered. Why other two BADI are not getting triggered. That is my question. Regards, Jagadhatri

entry.title: Case reporter/owner to be changed to myself
entry.content:
Customer would like to know if it's possible to change the reporter or owner for an incident created.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Case reporter/owner to be changed to myself
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please kindly follow the KBA2403394 - How to change support case details - SAP for Me - SAP for Me.

Once a support case has been submitted to SAP it is not possible to change the S-user ID (reporter), but additional contacts (S-users) can be added according to KBA 2213199.

However, if the S-user that created a case is to be deleted and a new S-user ID taking over the case, the new S-user ID must log a new case and indicate it is a continuation of previous case number.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: MS Dynamics to SAP BW Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,

we need your suggestions and insights. we are planning to move from ECC 6.0 (on HANA DB) to MS Dynamics. Currently, the ECC system is connected to a BW 7.5 on HANA system.

If transitions from ECC to MS Dynamics, what challenges or possibilities might arise in the target BW system?

And what are the BW versions will support and how to setup connection between those systems (MS Dynamics to SAP BW.

Thanks & Regards

Dhananjaya Naidu

entry.title: Re: CI DS Task in INSERT_UPDATE doesn't update values
entry.content: I'm afraid this is by-design. If you want the old data get deleted, need to use 'REPLACE' instead of 'INSERT_UPDATE'

entry.title: Build APP build Issue
entry.content:
Please help.
I am facing an issue while building Android App (Client run time version - 4.12.192). The error message is as follows:
AB version: 3.11.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

entry.title: possibility to have 4th custom code for account assignment
entry.content:
Hi Team

Due to the reporting requirement, my client is seeking possibility to have another custom code to be used for account assignment. Currently the client has consumed all 3 custom fields. We wonder if it is possible to have 4th custom code.

If it is not possible, then please advise if there is other options available such as leveraging existing data fields to be used for various business transactions including journal entry postings.

Look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: possibility to have 4th custom code for account assig...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

In SAP Business ByDesign, the standard configuration allows for up to three custom fields (custom codes) for account assignment. If all three custom fields are already utilized, adding a fourth custom field is not possible within the standard system capabilities.

Regards

entry.title: Re: BW cockpit is not working
entry.content: Thanks for response, we have followed all the above step, still issue is prsists.

Thank you, speakers, Mahesh / Gupta Kandula / Raghu / Immanuel / Ruthvik / Swapna / Dileep Kumar.

entry.title: how to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA On Prem using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
 my team has been trying to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA using cloud connector. We have installed and configured the cloud connector in BTP. We have also installed cloud connector on our S4HANA. But everytime while building a live connection in SAC in the Connections section we keep getting the error : "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. Possible causes: The SSL certificate is not trusted, or a network error occurred. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 23075871-0937-4657-8611-230123129568"


Can someone please help us to solve this particular error?

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: Apple pencil on Process Manager
External Users and approvals
entry.content:
Hello all,

When we create an item with approval and offer it to both external and internal users, how do we make the system skip the approval for the external users? One way is to duplicate the item in 2 libraries - one with approval and one without - but that is way too much admin work. Another way is to assign a dummy manager but that too comes with cost. Has anyone found another way for this kind of situation or has a suggestion please?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Apple pencil on Process Manager
entry.content: Can you please take it over and talk with your colleages. Many thanks and regards Nico

entry.title: Re: FioriElements - Grouping of table rows
entry.content:
Focusing on the CDS annotations:

- make sure to include a `visualizations` setting in your presentationvariant

- make sure to include the presentationvariant reference in the object page facet where it adds the table to the screen.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAc...
entry.content: I'm not sue how your data looks like, I assume you maybe don't the FOREACH loop. You may instead add a check if the month is the last month of the employee and calculate the ratio(even without the variable).

entry.title: Re: Counting scenario with RF in EWM
entry.content:
Hi @Miguel_Nava ,

" if this can be achieved maybe with some development." -> This is very much Possible and can achieved.

My Opinion:

My understanding is EAN is SKU even if different EAN for Same Product based on SKUs/Selling item.

Design level-> You need to create individual warehouse tasks (Warehouse Order *EWM Technical Terms) for each scanning EAN. As per your example: "So if the operator scans two labels equivalent to 10 Pcs, the total count for the Task will be 20 pcs" -> Two Labels=> 2 SKUs => 2 Warehouse Tasks 

"On a extreme case, the operator has to scan 100 labes (with an EAN for 1 pc) to confirm a task for 100 Units."-> 100 Labels => 100 SKUs => 100 Warehouse Tasks 

"the total count for the Task will be 20 pcs" => You can add extra fields to visible as Total identify as unit quantity Example 10 Pcs=> Scan => 10 Pcs=> Scan Total =20.  1PC => Scan => 1 PC=> Scan....up to 100 Scans => Total = 100

You can restrict the  quantity manipulation on user screen. Example user can not change the quantity if it is EAN/SKU/Label.

Certainly some development is required in this case. 

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: eInvoice details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The business requirement is to send invoice forms with eInvoice details like IRN number and QR code as soon as billing document is created through an email to a customer. 

Once the invoice document, billing output changes its status to complete instantly. If eInvoice is not triggered for it, eInvoice details are missing from billing form.

Can you please let me know how to achieve this where as soon as billing document is created, email will be triggered to customer with eInvoice details without any delay and manual intervention.

Regards,

First, it is required to have the HSN in the database.

Then, you can use DTW to update Item Master data with the relevant HSN.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: @vihaan2018 Is this working for you ?

entry.title: SAP and Siemens – Better Together
entry.content:
In today’s fast paced and competitive market, where data is the foundation of the next technological revolution, companies transform their processes to deliver high-quality, sustainable products at an unprecedented speed, while embracing innovation and efficiency in the design approach.

Working together, SAP and Siemens continue to deliver purpose-built end-to-end digital threads that empower customers to define, develop, and seamlessly integrate product data in Siemens Teamcenter software with SAP Business Suite. This unified approach enables businesses to meet market demands faster while embracing innovation and sustainability.

Following the Lead of our Customers
Given the evolving market landscape and the adoption of new technologies, customers demand even more streamlined business processes that span product ideation, design, engineering, manufacturing, operation, and service. Building on the strategic partnership first announced in 2020, SAP and Siemens are enhancing the integration between Teamcenter and SAP Business suite so that customers can confidently and efficiently navigate their modern product development challenges. SAP and Siemens are now expanding the jointly developed integration across the value chain to deliver even more benefits to customers.

Strengthening World Class Integration
SAP and Siemens remain dedicated to advancing their world-class integration, delivering enhanced value through continuous innovation, and supporting end-to-end business processes from design to operation.

The next set of innovations for the jointly developed integration will focus on the extension of already available use cases, such as the phantom support for bill of materials, parallel routing / bill of process operations, class schema exchange, inspection / control plan transfer and work instructions. We will also be adding support for additional business processes, such as capital asset lifecycle management, and expanding use case coverage to broaden the potential value to our customers.

This partnership has created a best in class integration between Siemens Teamcenter and SAP Business Suite that enables faster cloud adoption to modernize businesses. Through our ongoing collaboration and expansion of the integration, Siemens and SAP will allow our joint customers to respond quickly to evolving product trends and market demands and look forward to containing to partner to deliver high-value solutions for customers.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud SM: Enhancements on the Environments Screen
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community members! 

I’m excited to share the improvements made to the Environment Screen in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM). In this blog we will explore the new design, which makes working with Environments easier and more intuitive. Actions like adding, editing, moving, and deleting are now clearer, with a structured and consistent flow. There’s no need to worry about accidental deletions or remembering to save—every change is confirmed and applied instantly. The interface is cleaner, and the process feels smoother, allowing users to focus on their work without unnecessary steps. With these improvements, managing Environments is now simpler, faster, and more reliable.

Adding, Copying, and Editing in Environments Screen

Before: 

Previously, adding, copying, or editing nodes and environments was done directly within the table through inline editing. Selecting “Add Node” or “Add Environment” activated an editable row where users could input the ID, version, and description. Copying through “Environment From” pre-filled these fields with data from the selected environment, allowing further change. Editing was accessed via a pencil icon on the right side of the row, enabling users to update only the description while the ID and version remained locked. 

After: 

In the new implementation, actions such as adding, copying, and editing nodes and environments are now performed through pop-up dialogs instead of inline editing. Each dialog is labeled according to the selected action.  

Choosing “Add Node” or “Add Environment” opens a dialog where users can enter the ID, version, and description.  

Editing is now initiated from the header section, and the pop-up allows changes to the description while ID and version remain greyed out. 

Copying via “Environment From” opens a similar pop-up with pre-filled data for editing. 

Moving of Nodes and Environments

Before: 

Users can select the node or environment they wish to move, drag it, and drop it onto the available node on the screen. For instance, as illustrated in the image below, they can move the environment to one of two nodes in the same folder or to the parent node of its current location. To move it to a different node, they must first drag and drop it to a node that allows further movement to a child Node. For example, they can place it in the main folder and then continue the drag-and-drop process to reach the intended node. This method can be labor-intensive due to the manual selection of the target folder without a clear hierarchy, which may take some time.  

When the user moves to the target node, they must save the change by clicking the “Save” icon. If they make a mistake, they have “Undo” and “Redo” buttons to correct it.   

After: 

In the updated Environment Screen, once users select their desired node or environment for moving, they need to click the “Move” option in the header. This action triggers a pop-up window, allowing the user to choose their preferred node either from the dropdown menu or from the node picker.  

The default value is set to Main (Root Node). Display between the main target field and the Node Picker hierarchy is synchronized. This feature is handy for users who don’t remember the exact name of the target node but know its parent. Choosing the parent node from the dropdown will highlight it in the node picker. After that, the user can select the child node where they want to move the selected node or environment.  

After clicking the “Move” button, the node or environment will be moved to the target node, which will be opened on the Environment Screen. This action will be saved automatically.  

Deleting of Nodes and Environments

Before: 

To delete a chosen node or environment, users should click the “Delete” button located in the header. This action will instantly remove the node or environment from the user interface, but users can undo or redo the change if they wish to revert it. Finally, they must click the “Save” button to confirm their changes. After saving, the undo and redo options will no longer be available.

After: 

In the new implementation, after selecting the node or environment they want to remove, users need to click on the “Delete” button in the header. However, this time, the node or environment will not be deleted immediately. Instead, a confirmation pop-up window will appear that shows how many nodes or environments will be deleted, and users need to confirm that they really want to delete them.  

After confirmation, users will receive an information blue message toast indicating that the process has started in the backend. Then, after it’s done, they will receive a successful green message toast. These messages provide clear feedback on the process and improve user experience. 

Conclusion 

The enhancement of the Environment Screen has made it more intuitive, efficient, and consistent. By replacing inline editing and drag-and-drop with pop-up dialogs, users now have a clearer workflow that aligns with other parts of the system. 

Key changes include: 

  • Automatic saving, eliminating the need for Save, Undo, and Redo buttons 
  • Edit and Move actions relocated to the header for better accessibility 
  • Deletion confirmation dialogs, preventing unintended data loss 
  • A move option with node picker, replacing manual drag-and-drop for environment movement 

These updates reduce complexity, minimize errors, and improve navigation, making interactions more intuitive and ensuring a more efficient workflow for users.  

I hope you find these updates helpful! If you have any questions or comments, feel free to post them in the comment section.

Stay tuned for the latest updates and insights on the next one. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting in SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN,

Thanks for this blog as well, very very helpfull.

When we set CountDate, does that automatically fill in CountTime as well? For example:

 

Date d = Now(); //let us say, that we run this code on 2025/02/25 08:57 AM
oIP.CountDate = d;

 

Will this code set oIP.CountTime to 08:57 AM ? Or would we have to do it like this:

 

Date d = Now(); //2025/02/25 08:57 AM
oIP.CountDate = d; //this would be 2025/02/25
oIP.CountTime = d; //this would be 08:57 AM

 

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Part 2: How to Create Dynamic Images in SAP Analytics Cloud Story
entry.content:
Hi Geetha,

That's a great article. I need to get images from HANA Database but rest of my data comes from S4HANA CDS Views. Can I have two models on these two different connections and then link them to display data in one story? TIA

entry.title: Re: Local Roots, Global Impact: How Grupo Nabeiro Navigated the Business Landscape in Angola
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Atsuko, great story!

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: May I ask why they might send you the same order again so you need a way to differ between them? Just as a precaution if the first send delays, they send a second one so the same order file #2 arrives and then file #1 arrives later, all to make sure you don't get in the same order 2x? As you stated using the FM to calculate a hash works as long as they don't send a "update". Like Pos 10-50 with their first send and then a seocond file which has Pos 60 or has Pos 20 changed. In that case you get a different hash and therefore can't get a match.

entry.title: Re: PM: Why aren't additional resources visible on the sc...
entry.content:
Hello @WendyDu,

the teams section in plan customer project is only for the section team that you are planning within the work package. To plan additional resources or expenses you have to access the section work packages and plan those within the work package.

Best regards,

David

entry.title: Re: Release after output
entry.content:
Hello @Nhu1 

As far as I know it means that the output is deleted from SAP spool once the output is printed.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Strategic maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi Mark,

its not possible with a single strategy plan. you need to create 3 separate plans with a scheduled start date difference of 1 year.

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for SAP HANA DB Installation on SUSE L...
entry.content:
the sequence should be:

- install Linux OS

- install SAP HANA

- install SAPB1 

regards

entry.title: Re: Close Sap Solution Manager incident with request deleted
entry.content:
Hi Ricardo, 

I noticed that the information provided in your initial query was not sufficient for us to provide a comprehensive solution. If this issue is still relevant, I would appreciate it if you could provide more details. This will allow us to better understand the situation and offer a more accurate solution.  

Please un-accept this question anytime with detailed information. 

Best regards，
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Date calculation in TM Freight Order/Booking
entry.content:
Hi, I’m looking at confirming the dates that we can maintain in TM (embedded in S/4Hana) and possibly auto populate some of these dates. For dates such as the pick up acceptance and requested start/end dates, we can populate by maintaining the PUDR settings including condition table. However, I am unclear about some of these other dates and hence am seeking clarifications here.

1. Load and unload dates in FO/FB - can these dates also be populated via the PUDR settings?

2. Cargo Cut-off date under Pick-Up Location section in FO/FB - can this date be auto populated? I tested with schedule and departure dates setup but the field is still not populated when I created the FO. Hence, I want to double check whether this is the right set up or does the date only get updated at the stage level?

3. Availability date - can this date be auto populated?

4. Lastly, fields that we used to get in the shipment document under LE such as check in date and shipment start and end dates, what are the correct date fields that represent them? I am thinking it would be the departure and arrival dates at the stage level?

Appreciate any pointers on the above.

cheers

SFC

entry.title: Issues with Import Supplier Invoice Application (India Localization)
entry.content:
We are facing the following issues while attempting to post a supplier invoice (India localization) using the Import Supplier Invoice application:

  1. The Place of Supply field is missing in the template file.
  2. There is no option to maintain Withholding Tax details in the template file.
  3. We are receiving a warning message during the process.

Please assist us in resolving these issues while posting invoices.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting in SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hi Johan_Hakkesteegt,

It's been a while since I used it.

From what I remember, it specifies the exact time when the counting starts.

Since you seem to have the code, could you try running it without setting the CountTime? I believe it should automatically assign a value.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Learning Hub available to individuals?
entry.content:
Hi Lorie, 

Hope the following link helps:
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/how-can-an-independent-consultant-purchase-a-new-redesigned-sap-learning/qaq-p/13603893

I see https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html provides the way to be priced by "users" per year. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content:
@Chad_He  SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) is designed as a unified platform that integrates the core functionalities of SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, among other components. While today these products exist as distinct solutions, over time the vision is to offer customers a seamless, integrated experience under the BDC umbrella.

In practice, this means that the capabilities you currently enjoy in SAP Datasphere (such as unified data modeling and semantic enrichment) and SAP Analytics Cloud (advanced visualization, planning, and analytics) will be accessible within a single, cohesive environment. Rather than completely replacing them overnight, SAP’s roadmap suggests these solutions will evolve and converge, streamlining the user experience while retaining their core strengths.

Ultimately, while the individual branding might shift, the rich functionalities of both SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud will continue to be available—just delivered through the comprehensive SAP Business Data Cloud platform.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content: @bikerin100I said internal architecture document. If you are an SAP employee, you might have access else it is under process to be published, As of now here is the help document related to SAP BDC https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_DATA_CLOUD?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: BW cockpit is not working
entry.content: Was the task list execution successful? Does it show any errors?
